text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
You looked so serious it made my heart skip a
beat. ♪

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Ehehe, I wonder where I should put this plushie...

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
It's an important memento of you, so I have to
pick the best spot!
